title: The Loop
subtitle: Compounding Decisions for Modern Founders
description: A practical guide to compounding decisions across product, capital, and people. The Loop teaches founders how to design feedback systems that get smarter every week.

title: Atomic Creators
subtitle: Tiny habits for big audiences
description: How the world's best independent creators build daily habits that compound into careers.

title: The Midnight Library
subtitle: A novel of second chances
description: Between life and death there is a library, and within that library, the shelves go on forever.

title: The Dragon's Promise
subtitle: Book One of the Ember Cycle
description: An epic fantasy of broken oaths, ancient magic, and the dragons who remember everything.

title: Digital Nomad Finance
subtitle: Money systems for borderless workers
description: Multi-currency banking, taxes, and investing for the location-independent professional.

title: Whispers in the Rain
subtitle: A romance
description: Two strangers, one storm, and a cafe that closes at midnight.

title: The AI Playbook
subtitle: Practical AI for product teams
description: Field-tested patterns for shipping AI features that customers actually use.

title: Salt and Stars
subtitle: Poems from the long road
description: A debut collection about distance, devotion, and what we carry home.

title: Cold Arithmetic
subtitle: A detective novel
description: Detective Mara Vance hunts a killer who leaves equations at every scene.

title: Quiet Leverage
subtitle: How introverts build outsized companies
description: Lessons from twenty introverted founders who built nine-figure businesses without burning out.

title: The Garden Protocol
subtitle: Wellness for knowledge workers
description: A 12-week reset for anyone who lives at a screen and wants their body back.

title: The Second Empire
subtitle: Sci-fi epic
description: A thousand years after the fall, the empire is rebuilt — by an AI that remembers everything humans forgot.

name: Deepak Menon
bio: Author exploring the intersection of strategy and storytelling.

name: James Okoro
bio: James writes about how independent creators build careers from tiny daily habits.

name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Sarah writes quiet, devastating literary fiction about second chances.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Priya builds worlds with dragons, oaths, and unforgivable choices.

name: Alex Chen
bio: Alex helps remote workers and digital nomads make sense of money across currencies and tax regimes.

name: Maya Rodriguez
bio: Maya writes contemporary romances about strangers who become inevitable.

name: David Park
bio: David writes both practical playbooks and sweeping sci-fi about the futures we build.

name: Ananya Desai
bio: Ananya writes poems about distance and protocols for getting your body back.

name: Kevin Tran
bio: Kevin writes detective novels with mathematical puzzles at their heart.

name: Rohit Menon
bio: Rohit profiles introverted founders building outsized businesses.
